author: ash the trash
text: Horrible prices and options of drinks, barly passing on food tast and the price of a new corvett for some fries that tast worse than second hand tires. Also extremly crowded

author: Dragos Alexandru
text:
Hello,

Yesterday evening, my wife and I were at your location around 22:00ÔÇô22:30. We waited about 15ÔÇô20 minutes before anyone noticed us and asked if we would like to order. When we finally ordered, we chose one portion of Traditional Bratwurst and one portion of Munich Sausage.

The food arrived after another 15 minutes, and that is where the big disappointment began. Both portions the Munich sausage and the bratwurst were completely cold, as if they had been taken straight out of the fridge or were leftovers from earlier that day. To be very clear, they were not lukewarm, they were cold.

I asked the waiter if the sausages were supposed to be served cold, and he said no. He then took the sausages from our plates and left us sitting there with only the chips. I do not understand this, as we ordered the food to eat the sausages together with the chips, not to eat the chips first and the sausages separately.

After another 15 minutes, the sausages were brought back to us. And what did we receive ? The same sausages, simply reheated. I know this because I had already bitten into one of them, and it was obvious that these were the same sausages, reheated in a microwave.

Are you not ashamed to serve customers cold sausages possibly leftovers from the previous day or from the morning and then, without any shame, reheat them in a microwave and bring back the same food ? And to charge 89 shekels for one portion of sausages ?

This is a disgrace of a place. I will make sure not to recommend it to anyone I know. This was the first and last time I will ever visit this place.
